case_title: ELLIS STREET STUDIOS LLC VS. WAYNETT BENNETT ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ELLIS STREET STUDIOS LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BENNETT, WAYNETT THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 376 ELLIS STREET #501 CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO CA 94102, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 75496747)
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT BENNETT, WAYNETT
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ELLIS STREET STUDIOS LLC AS TO DEFENDANT BENNETT, WAYNETT DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, E-FILING REJECT, (TRANSACTION ID # 75457603) SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF ELLIS STREET STUDIOS LLC AS TO DEFENDANT BENNETT, WAYNETT
DECLARATION OF HOWARD OLSEN IN SUPPORT OF CLERK'S JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 75457603) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ELLIS STREET STUDIOS LLC
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT BENNETT, WAYNETT

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 75180251), PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF ELLIS STREET STUDIOS LLC SERVED DEC-03-2024, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
VERIFICATION BY LANDLORD REGARDING RENTAL ASSISTANCE - UNLAWFUL DETAINER (TRANSACTION ID # 75457603) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ELLIS STREET STUDIOS LLC AS TO DEFENDANT BENNETT, WAYNETT DOES 1 TO 10
UNLAWFUL DETAINER COVER SHEET (RENT DUE AFTER 3/31/2022) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ELLIS STREET STUDIOS LLC AS TO DEFENDANT BENNETT, WAYNETT DOES 1 TO 10

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 75180251), PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF ELLIS STREET STUDIOS LLC SERVED DEC-03-2024, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BENNETT, WAYNETT
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 75457603) AS TO DEFENDANT BENNETT, WAYNETT
